name_en: Bronze bell of Ogawa-ji Temple
description_en: This is a tangible cultural property, classified as historical materials. It is designated by Kodaira City. It is located at Ogawa-cho 1-733, on the grounds of Ogawa-ji Temple.

name_en: Suzuki festival music (bayashi)
